text: CEO Brian Chesky announced strategic shifts during the earnings call, stating the company will pursue hotels 'significantly more aggressively' going forward C008. This hotel expansion initiative contributed to the post-earnings share decline of roughly 6% C008. Separately, Chesky outlined an AI-first strategy for travel planning, noting 'you can't do travel planning without AI going forward' as Airbnb expands its customer service agent capabilities C010. R&D intensity remained elevated at 19.70% of revenue in Q2 2025, reflecting continued investment in technology infrastructure K005.

issues.offending_span: This hotel expansion initiative contributed to the post-earnings share decline
issues.explanation: Chunk C081 states that the CEO made the comment and 'Meanwhile, investors sent shares down roughly 6%'. The use of 'Meanwhile' indicates temporal correlation, but the chunk does not state that the hotel initiative *caused* or *contributed to* the share decline. The causal link is not supported by the evidence.
issues.recommended_fix: Rephrase to reflect correlation rather than causation (e.g., 'The announcement coincided with a post-earnings share decline of roughly 6%').
